name: attribution_attribute
briefDescription: Attribution record created binding agent to content region .

name: attribution_blame
briefDescription: Returns full blame map each region mapped to its most recent author .

name: attribution_history
briefDescription: Full attribution chain for a specific region in chronological order .

name: attribution_set_ownership
briefDescription: CODEOWNERS style ownership rule set for path pattern .

name: attribution_query_owners
briefDescription: Returns owners matching the path against ownership patterns .
